description: Extracts function name and parameter values from user query text and generates the appropriate JSON function call

inputs.name: query_text
inputs.description: The user's natural language request containing function name and parameter values to extract

inputs.name: available_functions
inputs.description: JSON string containing the available function definitions with their parameter schemas and requirements

output.description: Returns a JSON object with the function name as the top-level key and its parameters as a nested object. For the math.hypot example: {'math.hypot': {'x': 4, 'y': 5}} where x and y are the actual integer values extracted from the user query, not the parameter descriptions.

fields.function_name: dict - The function call object with extracted parameter values

workflow_spec.name: Function Call Generator
workflow_spec.description: Parses user queries to extract function parameters and generates appropriate JSON function calls with actual values
